positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a constellation map and celestial body grouping, featuring deep navy blues, luminous turquoise, and gold leaf accents. The main subject is a detailed, swirling depiction of the Milky Way combined with abstract geometric shapes representing stellar drift. Use thick, clean outlines and a woodcut-inspired etching style mixed with modern digital glow effects. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, centered, and suitable for direct application onto fabric. The overall mood should be mysterious, whimsical, and cosmic. High contrast is essential, emphasizing clean silhouettes of the stars against the dark background. Suitable for a celestial body print on a dark garment.
negative: photorealistic, messy, grunge, blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, faded, graffiti, anime
